findings.summary: The Unit 2-C QuickActionsModal snippet still is not directly actionable against the target file.
findings.evidence: The plan snippet at plan.md:916-926 contains a literal nested ```typescript line and derives targetId from activeTab?.id. The target file defines QuickAction in src/renderer/components/QuickActionsModal.tsx:16-21 and builds mainActions from activeSession, but it does not define an activeTab local; its tab-specific logic uses activeSession.activeTabId / activeSession.aiTabs.findIndex(...) at QuickActionsModal.tsx:568-590.
findings.impact: An implementer still has to re-derive the active-tab lookup from source before applying the compaction action, so Phase 2 remains short of implementation readiness.
findings.recommended_fix: Rewrite the Unit 2-C compaction snippet to use a real file-local active-tab lookup from QuickActionsModal.tsx, remove the literal extra ```typescript line from the code block, and keep the QuickAction object in the correct { id, label, action, subtext } shape.
